questions.question: What is Leadville-Lake's elevation in meters?
questions.context: Referenced question 1: The highest airport in the United States is Leadville-Lake County at 9,934 feet. On a warm 86°F day, what is your density altitude with a pressure of 30.25" Hg?

questions.question: Engine displacement is a measure of the volume of air an engine can intake. A Lycoming IO-360 engine displaces 360 cubic centimeters. What is that volume of displacement in gallons considering 1 cc = 1 mL?
A C150 is cruising at a true airspeed of 60 MPH. How many meters per second does that convert to?
If 640 acres equals 1 square SM, 40 acres is equivalent to how many square kilometers?
You have 46,300 lbs of Jet A on board an aircraft weighing in at 197,800 LBS. How many liters do you have? (Assume 1 gallon = 6.75 LBS)
At 6,500' MSL, an outside air temperature of 15°C would yield an increase of how many knots from 137 KIAS to true airspeed?
How many kilograms is equivalent to 84 LBS?

Chicago O'Hare (ORD) airport has multiple runways. RWY 10L is 2.14 nm long, RWY 10C is 329,200 cm long, RWY 9R is 3753 yards long, and RWY 22L is 96,900 inches long. Which of the four runways is the longest?
You calculate that your C150 can climb at 475 FPM given the outside conditions. How fast is that in meters per second?
A tank holds 180 ounces of oil. How much does all of that oil weigh?
How many kilograms is equivalent to 40% of three fully loaded 60-pound pallets?

After upgrading to captain at your first airline job, you decide that it is time to have a little fun and get your tailwheel endorsement in a Cessna 120. While in the pattern, you look at your airspeed indicator which reads 63 miles per hour. How fast is that in knots?

After landing at a Canadian airport during your attempt to circumnavigate the globe, you decide to fill up your fuel tanks. You know that your tanks currently hold 5 gallons out of a 68-gallon maximum capacity, and you prepay at the FBO to fill the rest. After fueling, you start the engine and notice that your fuel gauge is not indicating full tanks, and you realize that you've accidentally paid for 63 liters of fuel instead of 63 gallons. Knowing this, what percentage of the maximum capacity are your tanks currently at?
How many quarts is equivalent to 55 Liters?
A pilot's medical reads 6' 5" for their height. Upon disembarking in the UK, the customs form requests the pilot's height in centimeters. What should the pilot write down?
How many miles per hour is equivalent to 48 meters per second?
How much does 12 liters of Avgas weigh?

Given the following conditions, what is your true airspeed? Cruising altitude = 9,500' MSL; [[NEXT_LINE]] True Course = 205°; [[NEXT_LINE]] Indicated airspeed = 124 knots; [[NEXT_LINE]] OAT = -12°C; [[NEXT_LINE]] Altimeter setting = 30.22" Hg.

Your friend just took delivery of a Piper Navajo that was previously owned by the NFL's greatest quarterback, Snap McPigskin. Upon review of the manuals, you've discovered all the performance charts were converted to yards instead of feet, likely because yards were McPigskin's favorite unit on the gridiron. You calculate a takeoff run of 563 yards. Your runway is 4,300' long. How much distance remains once you become airborne?
Convert the following: 30.30" Hg = ___ mb.
In order to accurately request fuel while flying internationally, how many liters of fuel are equivalent to 25,500 pounds of fuel assuming one gallon of fuel weighs 6.75 pounds?
Convert 512 fluid ounces to liters.
Convert 38 meters per second to feet per second.
A temperature of 17°F is equivalent to ___°C.
Assuming IAS = CAS, what would the airspeed indicator read for an aircraft at 9,300' pressure altitude, temperature of 10°F, 165 KTAS, and calm winds?

Your new-to-you 1952 Cessna 150 burns a bit of oil. After reviewing the logs, you've decided to find out exactly how much oil has been put through your engine. It turns out that 216 pints have been added over the years. How many kilograms is that?
A fuel sample consists of 8 fluid ounces. The total tank capacity is 50 gallons. If the tank is 3/4 full, what percentage of fuel was collected for sampling?
You need a minimum of 9,200 pounds of jet fuel added to your aircraft. How many gallons should you request? (Use 6.7 lbs/gal)

The CRJ 900 can accommodate 5,350 pounds of cargo. If the average checked suitcase weighs 15 kilograms, how many suitcases could be on board if the cargo is to only be loaded to 80% of the maximum capacity?

A jet with 180 seats is loaded 95% full. Twenty passengers receive a full-size 8 oz drink. The rest receive only 4 oz drinks and a lot of ice. If the drinks are poured from two-liter bottles, how many bottles will be used?
To measure the velocity of wind, an ASOS uses rotating cups attached 4 inches away from a central shaft. If the sensor detects the shaft rotating at 800 RPM, what is the wind speed in knots?
What is the ground speed in kilometers per hour?
questions.context: Use the following information for questions 1-4. [[TABLE]]

questions.question: One tablespoon of additive is equivalent to 0.5 fl oz. If you add 3 tablespoons of additive to 1 gallon of gas, what is the percentage of the additive to the total volume?
Echo tops indicate storms reaching 13 km. What Flight Level would that be?
Hurricane Idalia had a minimum central pressure of 941 mb. What would the altimeter setting be at the center of the storm?
What is the distance between LAX and HNL in kilometers?
questions.context: Use the following information for questions 15-18. The distance between LAX and HNL is 2,084.1 NM on a true course of 252°. Cruise altitude is 32,000', ISA+9°C, airspeed of 462 KTAS.

questions.question: Knowing your old C180 leaks about 0.3 quarts of oil per hour, between every 100 hour inspection how many liters of oil will you have to put in?
The pressure altitude is 10,500 feet with a temp of -20°C. Your indicated altitude is 10,000 feet and the station altitude is 5,000 feet. What is your true altitude?
How many kilograms of 100LL avgas does it take to fill up your aircraft's 48 U.S. gallon tanks?
You plot a course east from N47°57'14" W97°11'27" to N48°4'27" W96°11'8". What is the distance between these two points?
You are climbing out at 56 KCAS. The current conditions are 86°F and A30.12" Hg which yields a density altitude of 2,850'. What is your climb TAS?
You note that the cabin of your TBM 960 can pressurize up to 6.2 psi. How many inches of mercury does that equate to?
An Airbus A320 can hold 41,285 pounds of Jet A. How many imperial gallons is that assuming a specific gravity of 6.76 lbs/US gallon?
If a 50-gallon oil drum is 88% full, how much does it weigh?
Flying 130 KIAS at a pressure altitude of 7,500' and OAT of -36°C, what is the TAS?
The current wind is 16.15 MPH. How many knots is that?
You are flying in Mexico and they tell you that the current pressure is 1045.3 MB. What would you put into your altimeter (inches Hg)?
The coldest recorded temperature on earth was on July 21, 1983 at -128.6°C. What is that temperature in Fahrenheit?

At FL200 your primary flight display switches to meters and hPa for the altitude and altimeter setting. You can't seem to switch it back! If the ATIS reports 29.68" Hg and ATC clears you to descend to 9,000' MSL, at what display altitude and altimeter setting would you level off?
The maximum weight of a Challenger 300 is 17,690 KG. What is this in pounds?
Assuming a fuel density of 6.75 LBS/GAL, if the Challenger 300 holds 14,150 LBS, how many liters is that?
On a Lycoming engine, the maximum cylinder head temperature is 500°F. What is that in Celsius?
435 MPH = ___ meters per second.

You're in Mexico and the fuel truck pulls up to ask how much fuel you need. You know you want 2,500 LBS of Jet A, but he needs to know what it is in Liters. What do you tell him? Assume a gallon of Jet A weighs 6.7 pounds.
Hurricane Sandy reported as low as 943 Mb, what is that in inches of mercury?
1437 NM equals how many SM?
337 hours equals how many weeks?
Traveling 120 feet in 4.7 seconds is equivalent to how many miles per hour?
19 feet equals how many centimeters?
You are just about to complete your first landing at an international destination. However, the ATIS reports the altimeter setting is 1007 MB. Your altimeter only accepts inches Hg. What do you set?
ATC tells you to descend at 2,300 feet per minute for crossing traffic. What would that be in meters per second?
From the previous question, what is the altimeter setting in hectopascals?
questions.context: Referenced question 17: You are departing out of Eagle, CO (6547') where the altimeter setting is 30.24" Hg and the temperature is 94°F. What is the density altitude?

questions.question: After you landed from your flight, you figured out you burned 5,319 LBS of Jet A, how many kilograms is that?

You are working as a fueler at an airport. A transient aircraft lands and requests to be refueled, but can only take on 78 pounds of 100LL because he is picking up a passenger that weighs 157 LBS. How many liters of fuel do you pump?
How many 1-quart oil cans will it take to equal the weight of six 55-gallon drums of 100 LL avgas?
The longest contiguous U.S. flight is from KMIA to KSEA at 4,383.86 KM. How long is this in feet?
The FBO fuel truck can hold 10,000 gallons. 9,956 gallons of that is usable AVGAS. If the truck is 42% full, how many liters are left in the fuel truck?

You've decided to fulfill a longtime dream and fly into this year's AirVenture in Oshkosh, Wisconsin. You have faith in your single engine airplane, and have decided to fly across Lake Michigan rather than around it. Your course across the lake will be 285°, and the winds at your chosen altitude of 8,500 feet are 220° at 27 knots. Indicated airspeed is 105 knots. The temperature and pressure at 8,500 are both standard. Before you go any farther, if something goes wrong, how cold will the water below be in Fahrenheit if latest reports indicate a water temperature of 17°C?

Upon receiving the fuel slip, you review the amount of fuel uploaded to make sure you were charged appropriately. The slip says 11,300 liters were pumped (You're in Cancun today). How many U.S. gallons is this?
At an FBO preflighting your jet, how many gallons do you tell the fueler to put on if your dispatch paperwork says total fuel of 5,201 pounds? (Use specific gravity of 0.8 kg/liter)

The price of fuel at the Niagara Falls Intl airport (KIAG) is $5.94 US/gallon and just across the border at the Niagara District airport in Canada (CYSN) the price of fuel is $1.94 CAN/liter. If the exchange rate is $1.34 Canadian to $1 US, where is it cheaper to fill your 40 gallon aircraft, and by how much?

You finally upgraded to captain at your first airline job. Now that you have a little money, (after paying those student loans of course), you decide that it is time to have a little fun and get your tailwheel endorsement in a Piper Cub. This airplane is a lot slower than the regional jet you've been flying. While in the pattern, you look at your airspeed indicator which reads 75 miles per hour. How fast is that in knots?

The first landing was a little shaky, but now you're getting the hang of it. You come to a full stop right at your grass runway's intersection with the paved runway, which your instructor says is exactly 1/2 of a kilometer (He's from Australia). How many feet of runway did you use?
80 KM is equivalent to how many yards?
28.4 liters is equal to how many US gallons?
75 millimeters is equal to how many feet?
0.05 Statute mile per second = ___ meters per second.

Your flight school just acquired a Trinidad that you are excited to fly for the first time. The only problem is the fuel system is labeled in liters and the line guy will not fuel the plane until you give him some numbers that make sense. If you need 125 liters how many gallons should you tell him?
The range of the Boeing 737-800 is 3,115 nm while the latest variant, the Boeing 737 MAX 8, has a range of 4,045 SM. How many meters farther can the Boeing 737 MAX 8 fly?
Which weighs more: 14 imperial gallons of Jet A (6.8 LBS) or 63 liters of 100LL?
20% of two 40-pound fully loaded pallets are equivalent to how many kilograms?

Your hangar neighbor has the same kind of airplane as yours, except that his airspeed indicator is calibrated in miles per hour, while yours is calibrated in knots. While flying in formation at the same speed, you maintain 104 knots. His airspeed indicator shows 125 miles per hour. You are sure that yours is correct, so which can you correctly say about his airspeed indictor?

choices.text: It is indicating about 5.3 miles per hour too fast
It is indicating about 3.5 miles per hour too slow
It is indicating about 10% too fast.

questions.correctChoice: It is indicating about 5.3 miles per hour too fast

questions.question: 999 mb = ____ inches Hg
As you approach KTVC you note that runway 28 is 2103 meters long. How long is the runway in yards?

You decide to fly on an international cross country flight. When you get to your destination, you decide to refuel. However, the airport's truck only measures fuel in liters. If you need 38 gallons of fuel, how many liters do you tell the fueler to put in?
32 ounces = ___ liters
How much does 12 pints of oil weigh?
Can your 28 meter wingspan sailplane fit in a 30 yard wide hangar?

choices.text: Yes you will clear it by .61 meters
Yes you will clear it by .56 meters
No you are short by .56 yards
No you are short by .61 yards

questions.correctChoice: No you are short by .61 yards
questions.context: Referenced question 18: A German sailplane with a 28 meter wingspan has a glide ratio of 65:1. How far will it glide in a straight line from 7,500' AGL to touchdown under calm winds?

questions.question: Which best describes the weight of a 55 kg drum of oil?

choices.text: the same as 38 quarts of oil
the same as 20 gallons of AVGAS

questions.correctChoice: the same as 20 gallons of AVGAS

questions.question: If installing oversize tires on the main landing gear reduces normal cruise speed by 12% and the cruise speed before installing the tires is 87 knots, what will the cruise speed be after installing the new tires?
You put the bars in a duffel bag with an empty weight of 1.5 pounds. How many kilograms does the full bag weigh?
questions.context: Referenced question 29: You have three 5-ounce bars of 0.999 fine silver which cost $22.95 per ounce. How much did you pay?

questions.question: You sell the bars to a crazy Canuck who pays $39.25 Canadian (CAD) per ounce. How much profit do you make in US Dollars if the current exchange rate is $1.14 CAD to $1 USD?
questions.context: Referenced question 29: You have three 5-ounce bars of 0.999 fine silver which cost $22.95 per ounce. How much did you pay?

questions.question: The hottest day on record in the United States is 134°F. What is that in Celsius?
How much does 7 quarts of oil weigh?

While fueling in a foreign land, you know you need 255,000 lb. of fuel in your Boeing 747-400. You already know how many gallons of fuel you need, since that's an easy 6.75 lb./gallon, but the fueler asks how many liters of fuel you need.
325 milliliters = ____ ounces
Curious as to the coldest place on Earth now, you learn that scientists recently measured a record setting -93° Celsius in Antarctica. What is that in Fahrenheit?
Yesterday you flew your Cessna 206 Stationair for 5.5 hours and burned 4 quarts of oil. How many pounds per hour are you burning?
5 KM = ____ feet
0.85 liters = ____ gallons

An aircraft's temperature probe is affected by air compression at high speeds. On one particular aircraft, the temperature rise is 0.8° C for every 10 knots increase in airspeed. If that aircraft indicates -23° F at 270 knots, what will it indicate at 305 knots?
If you are carrying 320 LBS of AVGAS, how many liters are you carrying?
If over the course of all the Regional competitions through the country judges drink 100 12-cup pots of coffee. How many liters of coffee do the judges drink?
The temperature in Denver is 36°C, what temperature do you tell your passengers in °F?
You have a young child who wants to be a pilot and they ask how fast they are going. You look down at your groundspeed and it reads 237 kts. What speed in mph do you tell them?

A new model of European airport tug can tow airplanes around the ramp at a maximum speed of 7.7 meters/second. Your FBO has a ramp speed limit of 10 miles per hour. What percentage of the tug's maximum speed can you tow at?
You're in Antarctica, and it's -100°C. What's your temp in °F?
If 15 gallons of oil weigh X number of pounds, how many quarts will we use to fill our 15 gallon capacity?
If an aircraft is flying at 192 knots, how many feet does it travel every second?
29.99 in Hg = how many millibars?
How much does 36 quarts of oil weigh?
2 How much does 54.4 gallons of fuel weigh?
